name: GIGABYTE Z790M AORUS ELITE AX ICE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 -- Support DDR5-7600(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - 2.5GbE LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790M AORUS ELITE AX ICE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with PCIe 5.0, high DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E.
